creator: ports@toco-domains.de
text:
Suggestion for commit message:

Log:
  www/pmwiki: update 2.2.80 -> 2.2.81

  Changes:
  * 2.2.81 (2015-10-31)
   * fixes an inconsistency with single line page text variables
   * wikis enabling UTF-8 will be able to override the text direction when inserting right to left languages
   * documentation update

   PR: 204518
   Submitted by: Torsten Zühlsdorff <ports@toco-domains.de> (maintainer)
